message:
fix: Update ArrayList API for Zig 0.15 in more runtime modules

- test_support.zig: Fix captured_stdout/captured_stderr ArrayList init/deinit
- io_uring_reader.zig: Fix ArrayList init for pending and results
- green_thread_stub.zig: Fix Scheduler.init ArrayList patterns

Zig 0.15 changed ArrayList API - allocator no longer stored internally.
